heroTitleId: Konferensi Bisnis dan Ekonomi Internasional ke-5
heroSubEn: Smart Business and Sustainable Value Creation: Integrating Technology, Strategy, and Society
heroSubId: Bisnis Cerdas dan Penciptaan Nilai Berkelanjutan: Mengintegrasikan Teknologi, Strategi, dan Masyarakat
dateVenueEn: Nov 12 - 13, 2026 • Hall-STIE Eka Prasetya & Virtual Hybrid
dateVenueId: 12 - 13 Nov 2026 • Hall-STIE Eka Prasetya & Virtual Hybrid

conferenceTracks.descriptionEn: Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning in Business Practices, Big Data Analytics and Business Intelligence, E-Commerce, Social Commerce, and Omnichannel Marketing, Automation, Robotics, and Supply Chain 4.0/5.0, Digital Entrepreneurship and Startup Ecosystems
conferenceTracks.descriptionId: Kecerdasan Buatan (AI) dan Pembelajaran Mesin dalam Praktik Bisnis, Analitik Big Data dan Intelijen Bisnis, E-Commerce, Perdagangan Sosial, dan Pemasaran Omnichannel, Otomatisasi, Robotika, dan Rantai Pasokan 4.0 / 5.0, Kewirausahaan Digital, dan Ekosistem Startup

conferenceTracks.descriptionEn: Circular Economy and Sustainable Operations, Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Implementation & Reporting, Green Marketing and Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR), Renewable Energy Economics and Sustainable Resource Management, Eco-Innovation and Clean Technology in Industry
conferenceTracks.descriptionId: Ekonomi Sirkular dan Operasi Berkelanjutan, Implementasi & Pelaporan Lingkungan, Sosial, dan Tata Kelola (ESG), Pemasaran Ramah Lingkungan dan Tanggung Jawab Sosial Perusahaan (CSR), Ekonomi Energi Terbarukan dan Pengelolaan Sumber Daya Berkelanjutan, Inovasi Ramah Lingkungan, dan Teknologi Bersih di Industri

conferenceTracks.descriptionEn: Agile Leadership and Strategic Resilience in the Digital Era, Corporate Governance and Ethics in Technology Adoption, Risk Management and Crisis Strategy for Modern Enterprises, International Trade, Global Value Chains, and Geopolitical Impacts, Public Policy, Economic Regulations, and Digital Sovereignty
conferenceTracks.descriptionId: Kepemimpinan yang Gesit dan Ketahanan Strategis di Era Digital, Tata Kelola Perusahaan dan Etika dalam Adopsi Teknologi, Manajemen Risiko dan Strategi Krisis untuk Perusahaan Modern, Perdagangan Internasional, Rantai Nilai Global, dan Dampak Geopolitik, Kebijakan Publik, Peraturan Ekonomi, dan Kedaulatan Digital

conferenceTracks.descriptionEn: Financial Technology (FinTech), Blockchain, and Cryptocurrency, Sustainable Finance and Green Banking, Digital Accounting, Automated Auditing, and Forensic Accounting, Capital Markets, Investment Strategies, and Corporate Finance, Microfinance and Financial Inclusion for SMEs
conferenceTracks.descriptionId: Teknologi Keuangan (FinTech), Blockchain, dan Cryptocurrency, Keuangan Berkelanjutan dan Perbankan Ramah Lingkungan, Akuntansi Digital, Audit Otomatis, dan Akuntansi Forensik, Pasar Modal, Strategi Investasi, dan Keuangan Perusahaan, Keuangan Mikro, dan Inklusi Keuangan untuk UKM

conferenceTracks.descriptionEn: Human Capital 5.0: Reskilling and Upskilling for the Future of Work, Technology and Society: Ethical AI, Privacy, and Digital Divide, Social Entrepreneurship and Community-Based Economic Development, Consumer Behavior and Well-being in a Tech-Driven World, Gender Equality, Inclusivity, and Diversity in the Workplace
conferenceTracks.descriptionId: Human Capital 5.0: Keterampilan Ulang dan Peningkatan Keterampilan untuk Masa Depan Pekerjaan, Teknologi, dan Masyarakat: AI Etis, Privasi, dan Kesenjangan Digital, Kewirausahaan Sosial dan Pembangunan Ekonomi Berbasis Komunitas, Perilaku Konsumen dan Kesejahteraan di Dunia yang Didorong oleh Teknologi, Kesetaraan Gender, Inklusivitas, dan Keragaman di Tempat Kerja

aboutTextId: Selamat datang di 5th International Business and Economics Conference (IBEC). Di era di mana disrupsi digital dan tantangan global saling bersinggungan, lanskap bisnis dan ekonomi dituntut untuk terus berevolusi. Konferensi tahun ini hadir sebagai platform global untuk mendiskusikan bagaimana organisasi dapat berkembang secara cerdas sekaligus memberikan dampak positif jangka panjang bagi dunia.
aboutTextEn: Welcome to the 5th International Business and Economics Conference (IBEC). In an era where digital disruption and global challenges intersect, the business and economic landscapes are required to constantly evolve. This year's conference serves as a global platform to discuss how organizations can grow intelligently while making a long-term positive impact on the world.
